results.requirement_text: The system shall require a discount percentage to be between 0 and 100 inclusive.

test_cases.title: Validate that a discount percentage within the allowed range is accepted
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system accepts a discount percentage within the allowed range.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Exercise the configured capability using valid input consistent with the requirement.
steps.expected_result: The system accepts the discount percentage.

traceability.coverage_item: Validate that a discount percentage within the allowed range is accepted

test_cases.title: Validate that the boundary values 0 and 100 are accepted

preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Exercise the configured capability using valid input consistent with the requirement.
steps.expected_result: The system accepts the boundary values 0 and 100.

test_cases.expected_result: The system accepts the boundary values 0 and 100.

traceability.coverage_item: Validate that the boundary values 0 and 100 are accepted

test_cases.title: Validate that values outside the range (e.g., -1, 101) are rejected

steps.action: Exercise the configured capability using invalid input outside the allowed range.
